reviews.review_description:
You get to fly. You get to use magic. You get to fight demons. And I hear there is a dragon. What more can you ask for? 
 
Having to hold the grip button to fly feels strange, but I guess it is one of those things that you can get used to. 
Personally I would prefer a bigger play area, with alternative paths to take. On the other hand, I've only reached stage two, so I don't know what lies ahead. 
 
For some reason the game made me think of Space Harrier that I played when I was young.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your comments. We are glad that you had fun playing our game. We will definitely take your feedback into consideration for future updates. We recommend you to fight with the Dragon. :))

reviews.review_description:
The graphics and magic shooting system were so good.
But it was little bit hard for me to go through.
The life and magic guage on my wrist and hand is nice idea but it was hard to check during battle. And If my flares were shot from wands not bare hands, targeting could be more clear and intuitive.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your insightful comment. 
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our game! 
Your feedback is invaluable to us, we will carefully consider your 
suggestions 
as we continue to strive for excellence and provide 
an even more enjoyable gaming experience for our players. 
Your support and input are greatly appreciated, and we look 
forward to exceeding your expectations in future updates!

reviews.review_description: Pretty smooth game play and good graphics I do like the theme of the game
I particularly like the concept of a flying mage casting spells to slay monsters. It's a good base, I look forward to future updates.

developer_response.body: thank you for your comment. That is so important for us.
